hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.command | test("^\\s*git\\s+commit(\\s|$)")' >/dev/null && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CLAUDE.md forbids git commits from the agent."}}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE '(^|/)crates/proto/src/generated/' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"crates/proto/src/generated/ is regenerated by `just proto` from proto/ledger/v1/*.proto. Hand-edits are silently overwritten. Edit the .proto source and run `just proto` instead."}}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE '(^|/)Cargo\.lock$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Cargo.lock is generated by cargo. Hand-edits cause drift that CI rejects. Update Cargo.toml and run `cargo +1.92 build --workspace` (or `cargo update -p <crate>`) to regenerate."}}' || true

if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.rs && "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *crates/* ]]; then crate=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | sed -n 's|.*crates/\([^/]*\)/.*|\1|p'); if [[ -n "$crate" && -f "crates/$crate/Cargo.toml" ]]; then pkg=$(awk -F'"' '/^name =/ {print $2; exit}' "crates/$crate/Cargo.toml"); if [[ -n "$pkg" ]]; then out=$(timeout 20 cargo +1.92 check -p "$pkg" --lib --tests --message-format=short --quiet 2>&1); if [[ $? -ne 0 ]]; then echo "[cargo check -p $pkg] errors:"; echo "$out" | grep -E '^(error)' | head -15; fi; fi; fi; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.proto ]]; then echo "[reminder] .proto changed — run \`just proto\` to regenerate crates/proto/src/generated/ledger.v1.rs, then \`just fmt\` and \`just clippy\`."; fi

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Serena MCP is available for this Rust workspace. Call mcp__plugin_serena_serena__activate_project with project=/Users/evan/Developer/inferadb/ledger once at the start of any code navigation or editing work — it enables symbolic tools (find_symbol, replace_symbol_body, get_symbols_overview, find_referencing_symbols) that the project CLAUDE.md relies on for safe edits."}}'
